message:
Fix CLIP weight loading for GGUF column-major format

- Fix matmulTransposed to correctly handle GGUF column-major storage
- Token embeddings and Q projection now match Python reference
- Add toggle for image vs text embedding mode in UI
- Add explanatory note about embedding types

Note: Full transformer attention still has discrepancies vs Python
reference due to simplified single-head implementation. Text search
is functional but may not produce optimal semantic matches.
